tool_purpose: A powerful web content extraction tool that retrieves and processes raw content from specified URLs, ideal for data collection, content analysis, and research tasks.

extract_depth.description: Depth of extraction - 'basic' or 'advanced', if usrls are linkedin use 'advanced' or if explicitly told to use advanced

format.description: The format of the extracted web page content. markdown returns content in markdown format. text returns plain text and may increase latency.

include_images.description: Include a list of images extracted from the urls in the response

urls.description: List of URLs to extract content from

arguments.name: urls
arguments.description: List of URLs to extract content from

arguments.name: extract_depth
arguments.description: Depth of extraction - 'basic' or 'advanced', if usrls are linkedin use 'advanced' or if explicitly told to use advanced

arguments.name: include_images
arguments.description: Include a list of images extracted from the urls in the response

arguments.name: format
arguments.description: The format of the extracted web page content. markdown returns content in markdown format. text returns plain text and may increase latency.

doc_snippets: A powerful web content extraction tool that retrieves and processes raw content from specified URLs, ideal for data collection, content analysis, and research tasks.
